title: cladomyza nivalis
intro: Cladomyza nivalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, also known as the buckthorn family. This plant is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions and wounds. The leaves of the Cladomyza nivalis plant have been used to create herbal preparations that aid in reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating conditions such as eczema and acne. Cladomyza nivalis is also believed to possess antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for infections and other health issues.
